title: Authors and Citation
text: Hautop B (2026). pkgbootstrap: Bootstrap Opinionated R Package Setup. R package version 0.0.0.9000, https://github.com/BjarkeHautop/pkgbootstrap.
code: @Manual{,   title = {pkgbootstrap: Bootstrap an Opinionated R Package Setup},   author = {Bjarke Hautop},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.0.9000},   url = {https://github.com/BjarkeHautop/pkgbootstrap}, }

what: Bootstrap an Opinionated R Package Setup
title: Bootstrap an Opinionated R Package Setup
text: pkgbootstrap creates new R package opinionated setup single function call. combines many usethis::use_*() calls, uses prek pre-commit panache, air jarl hooks.

title: Bootstrap an Opinionated R Package Setup
text: can install development version pkgbootstrap like :

title: Bootstrap an Opinionated R Package Setup
text: Creating GitHub repository requires GitHub token usethis can find; see usethis::gh_token_help() usethis::use_github() fails.
code: library(pkgbootstrap) bootstrap_pkg("~/GitHub/mynewpkg")  # or with a different license/author bootstrap_pkg(   "~/GitHub/mynewpkg",   author_name = "First Last",   author_email = "first.last@example.com",   license = usethis::use_gpl3_license() )

what: Create an opinionated R package — bootstrap_pkg
title: Create an opinionated R package — bootstrap_pkg
text: Creates new package usethis::create_package() applies opinionated setup:

title: Create an opinionated R package — bootstrap_pkg
code: bootstrap_pkg(   path,   author_name = "Bjarke Hautop Kristensen",   author_email = "bjarke.hautop@gmail.com",   license = usethis::use_mit_license(),   private = FALSE )

title: Create an opinionated R package — bootstrap_pkg
text: path Path new package created. last component path used package name. author_name Name package author (aut/cre Authors@R license copyright holder). author_email Email package author. license call usethis license function, e.g. usethis::use_mit_license() usethis::use_gpl3_license(). private GitHub repository private?

title: Create an opinionated R package — bootstrap_pkg
text: path new package, invisibly. new package left active usethis project activated usethis::proj_activate().

title: Create an opinionated R package — bootstrap_pkg
text: air formatting (usethis::use_air()), plus panache.toml jarl.toml configs git, pushed GitHub (usethis::use_git(), usethis::use_github()) license, MIT default Rmd README (usethis::use_readme_rmd()) codecov test coverage opinionated codecov.yml (usethis::use_coverage()) spell checking (usethis::use_spell_check()) R-CMD-check test-coverage GitHub Actions workflows (usethis::use_github_action()) Dependabot updates GitHub Actions pkgdown site deployed via GitHub Pages (usethis::use_pkgdown_github_pages()) .pre-commit-config.yaml panache, air jarl hooks pinned latest release, installed prek available finishes running hooks (letting formatters fix scaffolded files), re-knitting README, committing pushing result.
